revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Zero width space/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Zero width space/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES WHERE INDICATED AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{high-use}} {{Template shortcut|zwsp|0ws}}
{{tl|zwsp}} inserts the code {{code|​}} literally, which produces a {{unichar|200B|Zero-width space|nlink=Zero-width space}} in the rendered wiki-page.
=== Usage === This is a convenience template for the zero-width space character, U+200B ({{code|​}} or {{code|​}}).
It is invisible in display, but has the effect of acting as a line-breaking point for text inside a word that otherwise would not break. Whitespace and normal dashes (-) are already line-break points, but this template allows the special insertion of invisible breakpoints inside words. A break at a zero-width space does not cause a hyphen (or anything else) to appear; use {{tl|Soft hyphen}} if you want that.
The zero-width space character has a higher breaking priority than the hyphen character (-), so when using it in a phrase with hyphen, it is recommended to place a zero-width space immediately after each hyphen as well.
There are two ways to use this template: * With no arguments, i.e. {{tlf|zwsp}}, this produces a single zero-width space character * With one or more arguments, e.g. {{tlf|zwsp|this|is|a|test}}, the arguments are rendered separated by zero-width spaces. This reduces the amount of typing if several zero-width space characters are needed in rapid succession.
=== See also === * {{tl|non breaking hyphen}} * {{tl|soft hyphen}} appears only if text is wrapped mid-word at specified point * {{tl|word joiner}} {{Inline spacing templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE, PLEASE: --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] [[Category:Inline spacing templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
